title: 151 Adhesives 25 METER CARPET TAPE
features: SECURE RUGS & MATS: 151 Adhesives Carpet To Floor Tape, a durable high tack adhesive tape. Secures carpets, rugs and mats to reduce the risk of slipping and tripping on loose mats or rugs.
SMOOTH SURFACE CARPET TAPE: 151 Adhesives Carpet To Floor Tape, permanent adhesive, sticks down carpet, vinyl, cork and rugs to most smooth floor surfaces.
CLEAN TO USE, EASY TO APPLY: Always ensure that the surface is smooth, clean, dry and free of moisture, grease and dust prior to applying
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Ready to use Carpet to Floor tape. Size: 48mm x 25M. Store at room temperature
description: 151 Adhesives Carpet To Floor Tape, a durable high tack adhesive tape. Secures carpets, rugs and mats to reduce the risk of slipping and tripping on loose mats or rugs. Permanent adhesive, sticks down carpet, vinyl, cork and rugs to most smooth floor surfaces. Always ensure that the surface is smooth, clean, dry and free of moisture, grease and dust prior to applying. Ready to use Carpet to Floor tape. Size: 48mm x 25M. Store at room temperature
